content.problemStatement: Given two vectors of integers, find the common unique elements which are present in both the vectors.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input contains two space separated integers $N$ and $M$— the number of integers in first and second vectors. 
- The next line contains $N$ space separated integers - integers in first vector.
- Similarly the next(third) contains $M$ space separated integers - integers in second vector.
content.outputFormat: - Output on a new line the K space separated integers which are unique and common in both the vectors. Print them in sorted order.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There are only two unique elements which are common in both the vectors: 2 and 6
